creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This will require two fixes. One is a fix to libtool, which is in PR 
ports/172275. The other is a fix to ilmbase, which is attached. This patch
is sufficient, but not ideal. It causes all the libs to be built with
-pthread, not just the IlmThread lib. This shouldn't be a huge problem,
but isn't quite correct. Not sure yet if this is acceptable or if further
patches are necessary.

Steve
